title: Search results component with snippet highlighting for onboarding
purpose: Displays search results from the onboarding API with highlighted snippets and navigation to topic pages.
module_context: Exports a React component named SearchResults that uses React hooks and the onboarding API to fetch and display search results.

steps.content: Access the current project from onboarding context.
Extract the search query parameter from the URL.
Initialize state for search results, loading status, and error messages.
Perform a search when project or query changes, updating results and handling loading/error states.
Render the search header with query and result count.
Display error message if search fails.
Render each search result as a clickable link with file path and section label.
Show no results message when query is empty or no matches found.
